title: Beware of t / The Man Who Loved a Witch
overview: In the windy city of Fuuto, private detective Shotaro Hidari works with his friends to protect the citizens... in more ways than one. But a chance encounter with a bewitching femme fatale might spell a whole new kind of trouble for him, and his city.

title: Beware of t / The Culprit Is Right There
overview: The hunt for Tokime continues, but Shotaro begins to have growing doubts about her guilt, which leads to friction with his partner, Philip.

title: Beware of t / The Masked Defender
overview: The identity of the Road Dopant has been made clear, and Kamen Rider W is here to save the day. But questions still remain. Who is Tokime, and what happened to her memories?

title: The Terrible m / Wings of Death
overview: When a popular video game company's idol-spokeswoman/head developer starts receiving death threats, the Narumi Detective Agency is brought in to protect her.

title: The Terrible m / The Sound of a Leak
overview: Shotaro is injured defending the video game idol, Megu Kazamatsuri, leaving Philip in charge of the investigation. But can he and Tokime put aside their differences to protect their client?

title: The Terrible m / White Fangs
overview: The final confrontation with the Meganeura Dopant is at hand, and just as Tokime starts to settle in at the Narumi Detective Agency, a threatening force in the city's underworld begins to stir.

title: The Closed k / Dynamic Duo, Deserted
overview: After a flight of fancy leaves Shotaro and Philip stranded in the mountains during a blizzard, they stumble onto a mansion that hosts a bizarre ritual.

title: The Closed k / A Chain of Malice
overview: Shotaro and Philip struggle to discover the truth behind the Alcohol Dopant's attacks before there's another death.

title: The Closed k / The Ultimate Two Halves of One
overview: A confrontation erupts when the Alcohol Dopant's true identity is revealed, while Kamen Rider Accel battles the gruesome Scream.

title: Superhuman r / A Passport to Shadow Fuuto
overview: A young girl contacts the Narumi Detective Agency about her missing grandfather. But what does her case have to do with Shadow Fuuto?

title: Superhuman r / In Search of a Connection
overview: W and Accel are forced out of Shadow Fuuto by the nuclear-powered Nikaido and his army of monstrous Road Dopants. Will they find their way back in time to rescue Tokime and Rentaro?

title: Superhuman r / Death, and......
overview: Tokime tries to help Rentaro escape Shadow Fuuto, as the Kamen Riders track down Reactor's hideout.
